steps.title: Identify the contribution
steps.content: Bell hypothesized that humans had transported youlk through the region. Hammond and Porter contributed by confirming that their ancestors carried youlk while traveling, which directly supported that hypothesis.

steps.title: Separate roles clearly
steps.content: A says only that they had relevant information. B incorrectly credits them with confirming DNA similarity, which Bell found. C says they assisted but does not explain the specific contribution. The strongest choice connects their information to Bell's hypothesis. The answer is D.
